title: Metagraphs snapshot
description: Per-Yuma-epoch snapshot of Bittensor subnet aggregates. Pinned in SPEC.md §7.4.

stale.description: True when this snapshot is the previous one re-served because both sources failed

subnets.description: Sorted by uid ascending. Positional shape is load-bearing for the field render.

logoUrl.description: Owner-declared logo URL from Taostats /api/subnet/identity (schema v2; SPEC §3.8). Not validated for reachability.

description.description: Owner-declared 1–2 sentence subnet purpose (schema v3; SPEC §3.9). null when owner hasn't registered one.

github.description: Owner-declared GitHub URL (schema v3). null when absent. Not validated for reachability.

twitter.description: Owner-declared Twitter/X URL (schema v3). null when absent.

discord.description: Owner-declared Discord URL (schema v3). null when absent.

website.description: Owner-declared website URL (schema v3). null when absent.

daysSinceRegistration.description: Computed in pivot from (block - registeredAtBlock) / 7200 (~12 s blocks). null when registeredAtBlock is null.

emissionShareDelta24h.description: currentShare − share24hAgo (~20 epochs ago). null when insufficient history (first ~20 epochs after schema v3 cutover).

emissionShareDelta7epoch.description: currentShare − share7epochsAgo (~8 h). null when insufficient history.

realRevenueSignalDelta24h.description: currentSignal − signal24hAgo. null when insufficient history or either side is null.

rankDelta24h.description: Change in emission-share rank vs ~24 h ago (positive = improved rank). null when insufficient history.
